until false end oe=function(su) local sv,sw,sx,sy sw={} sy={5200,3863,2526,5293,3972,2627,5390,4065,2744,5479,4170} sx=function(sz) local ta=sy[sz] local tb=(sz*1333)%4096 local tc=(ta+tb)-3323 ei=function(wm,wn) local wo,wp,wq,wr,ws,wt,wu,wv,ww,wx,wy,wz,xa,xb,xc,xd,xe,xf,xg,xh,xi,xj,xk,xl,xm wp={} false end _do={} bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bhv[bhf[bhe]]>=bhv[bhf[bhc]];end end else if bhg<=141 then if bhg<=140 then bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bhv[(bhf[bhe]+bhf[bha])][bhv[bhf[bhc]]];else local bnw=bho[bhi] local bnx=bho[bhi-1] bhi=bhi-bl[2][16][5] bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bnx(bnw) end else if bhg>=143 then local bny=bhf[bhe] bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bge[bny] else bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bhv[bhf[bhe]]<=bhv[bhf[bhc]];end end end else if bhg<=136 then if bhv[bob]=bl[124](bod,nil,bgf) end end else if bhg>=bl[2][27][5] then local boe=bho[bhi] local bof=bho[bhi-1] local bog=bho[bhi-bl[2][16][5]] local boh=bho[bhi-bl[2][9][10]] bhi=bhi-bl[2][30][5] bhv[bhf[bhb]]=boh(bog,bof,boe) else if bhg<=137 then bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bhv[bhf[bhc]]<bhv[bhf[bhe]];else bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bhv[bhf[bhc]]*bhv[bhf[bhe]];end end end end else if bhg>=bl[2][26][4] then if bhg<=131 then if bhg>=131 then bhv[(bhf[bhc]-bhf[bha])][bhv[bhf[bhb]]]=bhv[(bhf[bhe]+bhf[bha])];else if bhg>=130 then local boi=bhf[bhb] local boj=bhf[bhe] local bok=bgl[bhf[bha]] local bol=bhv[boi] local bom=bol[bok] local bon=boi+boj-1 bhv[boi]=bom(bol,bl[7](bhv,boi+bl[2][16][5],bon)) else bhv[(bhf[bhb]-bhf[bha])]=bhv[bl[8](bhf[bhe],bl[8](bgi[bie-1][bhe],(bie+bhf[bha])))][bhv[bhf[bhc]]];end end else if bhg<=132 then bhv[(bhf[bhb]-bhf[bha])]=bhq else if not(bhv[bhf[bhb]]~=nil and bhv[bhf[bhb]]~=false) then bie=bgi[bie][bhe];end;end end else if bhg<=126 then if bhg>=126 then bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bgl[bhf[bhe]];else if bhg>=125 then local boo=bhf[bhe] bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bge[boo] else local bop=bho[bhi] local boq=bho[bhi-1] local bor=bho[bhi-bl[2][16][5]] bhi=bhi-bl[2][9][10] bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bor(boq,bop) end end else if bhg<=bl[2][18] then local bos=bhv[bhf[bhb]] if not bos then bie=bhf[bhe];end;else bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bgl[bhf[bhe]];end end end end end end end else if bhg>=36 then if bhg>=47 then if bhg<=56 then if bhg<=51 then if bhg<=49 then if bhg>=49 then bhu=bhu+1 bhp[bhu]=bid bid=bhi else if bhg<=47 then local bot=bhf[bhe] bge[bot][1]=bhv[bhf[bhb]] else bhv[bhf[bhb]]=-bhv[bhf[bhe]];end end else if bhg>=51 then local bou=bho[bhi] local bov=bho[bhi-1] local bow=bho[bhi-bl[2][16][5]] local box=bho[bhi-bl[2][9][10]] bhi=bhi-bl[2][30][5] box(bow,bov,bou) else local boy=bhf[bhb] local boz=bhf[bhe] local bpa=bhi+1 local bpb=(boz==0) and bhh or(boy+boz-1) for bpc=boy,bpb do bho[bpa]=bhv[bpc] bpa=bpa+1 end bhi=bpa-1 end end else if bhg<=54 then if bhg>=54 then do return bhv[bhf[bhb]] end else if bhg<=52 then bhv[bhf[bhb]]=not bhv[bhf[bhe]];else bhv[bhf[bhb]]=nil;end end else if bhg>=56 then local bpd,bpe=bhf[bhb],bhf[bhe] local bpf=bgm[bhf[bha]] local bpg=bl[2][16][5]+bpe local bph=bpf[bpg] local bpi=bpf[1] local bpj=bpe local bpk=bpf[2] local bpl=bpi+bpj*bpk local bpm=bph-bpl local bpn=bgk[bpm] local bpo=bpn[3652][1] local bpp=bpo[3] local else bhq=not bhq end else local brn=bhf[bhb] local bro=bho[bhi] bhi=bhi-1 bro() end else if bhg<=58 then if bhg>=58 then local brp=bhf[bhb];local bhv[(bhf[bhb]-bhf[bha])]=bhv[bhf[bhe]][bhv[bhf[bhc]]];else bie=bhj;end else if bhg>=154 then local bya=bgm[bhf[bha]] local byb=bho[bhi-bya[1]] local byc=bho[bhi-bya[2]] local byd=bho[bhi-bya[3]] bhi=bhi-bl[2][9][10] byd(byc,byb) else if bhg>=153 then bhv[(bhf[bhe]+bhf[bha])]=bhv[bhf[bhc]][bhv[bhf[bhb]]];else local bye=bgm[bhf[bha]] local byf=bye[1]-1 local byg=bho[bhi] local byh=bho[bhi-1] bhi=bhi-bl[2][16][5] local byi,byj=byh(byg) do local byk,byl=byi,byj bhv[byf]=byk bhv[byf+1]=byl end end end end else if bhg<=149 then if bhg>=149 then local bym=bho[bhi] local byn=bho[bhi-1] local byo=bho[bhi-bl[2][16][5]] local byp=bho[bhi-bl[2][9][10]] bhi=bhi-bl[2][30][5] local byq=bhy(bhx,byp(byo,byn,bym)) bhh=bhf[bhb]+byq-1 for byr=1,byq do bhv[bhf[bhb]+byr-1]=bhx[byr] end else if bhg<=147 then local bys=bhf[bhe] local byt=bhi local byu=byt-bys+1 local byv=bho[byu] bhv[bhf[bhb]]=byv(bl[7](bho,byu+1,byt)) bhi=byu-1 else bhv[bgi[bie][bhb]]=bhv[bgi[bie][bhe]]+bhv[bgi[bie][bhc]];end end else if bhg>=151 then local byw=bhf[bhb] local byx=bho[bhi] local byy=bho[bhi-1] local byz=bho[bhi-bl[2][16][5]] bhi=bhi-bl[2][9][10] do local bza,bzb=byz(byy,byx) bhv[byw]=bza bhv[byw+1]=bzb end else local bzc=#bhf[bhb];for bzd=1,bzc do bhv[bhf[bhb][bzd]]=nil;end end end end else if bhg<=165 then if bhg<=161 then if bhg<=159 then if bhg>=159 then bie=bhj;else if bhg<=157 then bhj=bgi[bie+bl[2][16][5]][bhb] bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bhv[bhf[bhe]][bhv[bhf[bhc]]];else bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bhv[bhf[bhe]][bhv[(bhf[bhc]+bhf[bha])]];end end else if bhg>=161 then bhj=bgi[bie+bl[2][16][5]][bhe] bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bhv[bhf[bhe]][bhv[bhf[bhc]]];else local bze=bhj local bzf=bhf[bhe] local bzg=bhv[bze] if not bzg then bie=bzf;end;end end else if bhg<=163 then if bhg<=162 then bhj=bgi[bie+bl[2][16][5]][bhe] bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bgl[bhf[bhe]];else bie=bhj;end else if bhg>=165 then bhj=bgi[bie+bl[2][16][5]][bhe] bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bhv[bhf[bhe]][bhv[bhf[bhc]]];else bhj=bgi[bie+1][bhb] bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bhv[bhf[bhe]]>=bhv[bhf[bhc]];end end end else if bhg<=170 then if bhg>=169 then if bhg>=170 then bie=bhj;else local bzh=bhj local bzi=bhf[bhe] local bzj=bhv[bzh] if not bzj then bie=bzi;end;end else if bhg<=167 then local bzk=bhj local bzl=bhf[bhe] local bzm=bhv[bzk] if not bzm then bie=bzl;end;else bhj=bgi[bie+1][bhb] bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bhv[bhf[bhe]]==bhv[bhf[bhc]];end end else if bhg>=173 then if bhg>=174 then bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bhj;else bhj=bgi[bie+1][bhb] bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bhv[bhf[bhe]]==bhv[bhf[bhc]];end else if bhg>=172 then bhj=bgi[bie+bl[2][16][5]][bhe] bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bhv[bhf[bhe]]*bhv[bhf[bhc]];else bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bgl[bhf[bhe]];end end end end end end else if bhg<=247 then if bhg>=230 then if bhg>=239 then if bhg<=243 then if bhg<=241 then if bhg>=241 then local bzn=bhf local bzo=bie if bzn[bha]==190 then bhv[bzn[bhb]]=bgf[bgl[bzn[bhe]]];else if bzn[bha]==135 then bhv[bzn[bhb]]=not bhv[bzn[bhe]];else if bzn[bha]==173 then bhv[bzn[bhb]]=bhv[bzn[bhe]][bhv[bzn[bhc]]];end end end local bzp=bgi[bzo+1] if bzp[bha]==286 then bhv[bzp[bhb]][bhv[bzp[bhe]]]=bhv[bzp[bhc]];else if bzp[bha]==47 then bhv[bzp[bhb]]=bgf[bgl[bzp[bhe]]];else if bzp[bha]==194 then bhv[bzp[bhb]]=not bhv[bzp[bhe]];end end end bie=bie+1 else if bhg<=239 then local bzq=bhf local bzr=bzq[bhb][1] local bzs=bzq[bhc][1] local bzt,bzu,bzv=bhv[bzr],bhv[bzr+1],bhv[bzr+bl[2][16][5]] local bzw,bzx local bzy,bzz local caa,cab local cac,cad while bzt<=bzu do bhv[bzr]=bzt bhv[bzr+bl[2][9][10]]=bzt bhv[bzq[bhb][2]]=bhv[bzq[bhe][2]] local cae,caf=bhv[bzq[bhe][3]],bzq[bhb][3];bhv[caf+1]=cae;bhv[caf]=cae[bgl[bzq[bhc][3]]] bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=bhv[bzq[bhb][4]] bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=bhv[bzq[bhb][5]] local cag cag=bgl[bzq[bhe][6]] bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=cag local cah=bzq[bhb][7] local cai=bho[bhi] local caj=bho[bhi-1] local cak=bho[bhi-bl[2][16][5]] bhi=bhi-bl[2][9][10] bhv[cah]=cak(caj,cai) bhv[bzq[bhb][8]]=bhv[bzq[bhe][8]] local cal,cam=bhv[bzq[bhe][9]],bzq[bhb][9];bhv[cam+1]=cal;bhv[cam]=cal[bgl[bzq[bhc][9]]] bhq=bhv[bzq[bhb][10]] bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=bhq bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=bhv[bzq[bhb][12]] bhi=bhi+1 bzy=bgl[bzq[bhe][17]] bzz=true end bhv[bzq[bhb][17]]=bzy bhv[bzq[bhb][18]]={} bhv[bzq[bhb][19]][bhv[bzq[bhe][19]]]=bhv[bzq[bhc][19]] if not cab then caa=bgl[bzq[bhe][20]] cab=true end caq=bho[bhi-bl[2][9][10]] bhi=bhi-bl[2][30][5] caq(cap,cao,can) bzt=bzt+bzv end bhv[bzr]=bzt bie=bzq[bhe][1] else local car=bhf local cas=car[bhb][1] local cat=car[bhc][1] local cau,cav,caw=bhv[cas],bhv[cas+1],bhv[cas+bl[2][16][5]] local cax,cay local caz,cba local cbb,cbc local cbd,cbe while cau<=cav do bhv[cas]=cau bhv[cas+bl[2][9][10]]=cau bhv[car[bhb][2]]=bhv[car[bhe][2]] end bhv[cas]=cau bie=car[bhe][1] end end else if bhg>=243 then if bhf[bhe]~=157 then local cbr=bgi[bhv[bhf[bhc]]] local cbs,cbt=cbr[bhe],cbr[bhb] cbr[bhb]=cbs cbr[bhe]=cbt bhf[bhe]=157 end else local cbu=bgi[bhv[bhf[bha]]] local cbv,cbw,cbx=cbu[bhc],cbu[bhe],cbu[bhb] cbu[bhb]=cbv cbu[bhe]=cbw cbu[bhc]=cbx bhf[bhb]=245 end end else if bhg>=247 then if bhf[bhb]~=21 then local ccb[bhb]=ccc ccb[bhe]=ccd ccb[bhc]=cce bhf[bhe]=241 end end end end else if bhg>=235 then if bhg<=236 then if bhg>=236 then local ccf=bhf local ccg=ccf[bhb][1] local cch=ccf[bhc][1] local bho[bhi]=bhq bhv[ccf[bhb][5]]=bhv[ccf[bhe][5]] bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=bhv[ccf[bhb][6]] local ccn=ccf[bhb][7] local cco=bho[bhi] local ccp=bho[bhi-1] bhi=bhi-bl[2][16][5] ccp(cco) bhv[ccf[bhb][8]]=bgf[bgl[ccf[bhe][8]]] if not ccm then ccl=bgl[ccf[bhe][9]] ccm=true end bhv[ccf[bhb][9]]=ccl bhv[ccf[bhb][10]]=bhv[ccf[bhe][10]][bhv[ccf[bhc][10]]] bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=bhv[ccf[bhb][11]] bhv[ccf[bhb][12]]=bgl[ccf[bhe][12]] bhq=bhv[ccf[bhb][13]] bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=bhq local ccq=ccf[bhb][15] local ccr=bho[bhi] local ccs=bho[bhi-1] bhi=bhi-bl[2][16][5] ccs(ccr) cci=cci+cck end bhv[ccg]=cci bie=ccf[bhe][1] else local cct=bhf local ccu=cct[bhb][1] local ccv,ccw,ccx=bhv[ccu],bhv[ccu+1],bhv[ccu+bl[2][16][5]] bhv[ccu]=k(function() for ccy,ccz in ccv,ccw,ccx do j(true,ccy,ccz) end end) bhh=ccu+bl[2][16][5] while true do local cda,cdb,cdc=bhv[ccu]() if not cda then break end do local cdd,cde=cdb,cdc bhv[ccu+bl[2][9][10]]=cdd bhv[ccu+bl[2][30][5]]=cde end bhv[cct[bhb][2]]=bhv[cct[bhe][2]] local cdf,cdg=bhv[cct[bhe][3]],cct[bhb][3];bhv[cdg+1]=cdf;bhv[cdg]=cdf[bgl[cct[bhc][3]]] bhq=bhv[cct[bhb][4]] bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=bhq bhq=bhv[cct[bhb][6]] bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=bhq local cdh=cct[bhb][8] local cdi=bho[bhi] local cdj=bho[bhi-1] bhi=bhi-bl[2][16][5] cdj(cdi) end bie=cct[bhe][1] end else if bhg>=238 then local cdk=bhf local cdl=cdk[bhb][1] local cdm=cdk[bhc][1] local cdn,cdo,cdp=bhv[cdl],bhv[cdl+1],bhv[cdl+bl[2][16][5]] local cdq,cdr local cds,cdt local cdu,cdv local cdw,cdx while cdn<=cdo do bhv[cdl]=cdn bhv[cdl+bl[2][9][10]]=cdn bhv[cdk[bhb][2]]=bhv[cdk[bhe][2]] local cdy,cdz=bhv[cdk[bhe][3]],cdk[bhb][3];bhv[cdz+1]=cdy;bhv[cdz]=cdy[bgl[cdk[bhc][3]]] bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=bhv[cdk[bhb][4]] bhq=bhv[cdk[bhb][5]] bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=bhq bhv[cdk[bhb][7]]=bgl[cdk[bhe][7]] bhq=bhv[cdk[bhb][8]] bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=bhq local cea=cdk[bhb][10] local ceb=bho[bhi] local cec=bho[bhi-1] local ced=bho[bhi-bl[2][16][5]] bhi=bhi-bl[2][9][10] bhv[cea]=ced(cec,ceb) bhv[cdk[bhb][11]]=bhv[cdk[bhe][11]] local cee,cef=bhv[cdk[bhe][12]],cdk[bhb][12];bhv[cef+1]=cee;bhv[cef]=cee[bgl[cdk[bhc][12]]] bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=bhv[cdk[bhb][13]] bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=bhv[cdk[bhb][14]] bhq=bhv[cdk[bhb][15]] bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=bhq bhv[cdk[bhb][17]]={} if not cdr then cdq=bgl[cdk[bhe][18]] cdr=true end bhv[cdk[bhb][22]][bhv[cdk[bhe][22]]]=bhv[cdk[bhc][22]] if not cdv then cdu=bgl[cdk[bhe][23]] cdv=true end bhv[cdk[bhb][23]]=cdu bhv[cdk[bhb][24]]=bhv[cdk[bhe][24]][bhv[cdk[bhc][24]]] bhv[cdk[bhb][25]][bhv[cdk[bhe][25]]]=bhv[cdk[bhc][25]] if not cdx then cdw=bgl[cdk[bhe][26]] cdx=true end bhv[cdk[bhb][26]]=cdw bhv[cdk[bhb][27]][bhv[cdk[bhe][27]]]=bhv[cdk[bhc][27]] bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=bhv[cdk[bhb][28]] local ceg=bho[bhi] local ceh=bho[bhi-1] local cei=bho[bhi-bl[2][16][5]] local cej=bho[bhi-bl[2][9][10]] bhi=bhi-bl[2][30][5] cej(cei,ceh,ceg) cdn=cdn+cdp end bhv[cdl]=cdn bie=cdk[bhe][1] else local cek=bhf local cel=cek[bhb][1] local cem=cek[bhc][1] local cen,ceo,cep=bhv[cel],bhv[cel+1],bhv[cel+bl[2][16][5]] local ceq,cer local ces,cet local ceu,cev local cew,cex while cen<=ceo do bhv[cel]=cen bhv[cel+bl[2][9][10]]=cen bhv[cek[bhb][2]]=bhv[cek[bhe][2]] local cey,cez=bhv[cek[bhe][3]],cek[bhb][3];bhv[cez+1]=cey;bhv[cez]=cey[bgl[cek[bhc][3]]] bhq=bhv[cek[bhb][4]] bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=bhq bhq=bhv[cek[bhb][6]] bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=bhq local cfa cfa=bgl[cek[bhe][8]] bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=cfa local cfb=cek[bhb][9] local cfc=bho[bhi] local cfd=bho[bhi-1] local cfe=bho[bhi-bl[2][16][5]] bhi=bhi-bl[2][9][10] bhv[cfb]=cfe(cfd,cfc) bhv[cek[bhb][10]]=bhv[cek[bhe][10]] local cff,cfg=bhv[cek[bhe][11]],cek[bhb][11];bhv[cfg+1]=cff;bhv[cfg]=cff[bgl[cek[bhc][11]]] bhq=bhv[cek[bhb][12]] bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=bhq bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=bhv[cek[bhb][14]] bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=bhv[cek[bhb][15]] bhv[cek[bhb][16]]={} if not cer then ceq=bgl[cek[bhe][17]] cer=true end bhv[cek[bhb][17]]=ceq bhv[cek[bhb][18]][bhv[cek[bhe][18]]]=bhv[cek[bhc][18]] if not cet then ces=bgl[cek[bhe][19]] cet=true end bhv[cek[bhb][19]]=ces bhv[cek[bhb][20]]={} bhv[cek[bhb][21]][bhv[cek[bhe][21]]]=bhv[cek[bhc][21]] if not cev then ceu=bgl[cek[bhe][22]] cev=true end bhv[cek[bhb][22]]=ceu bhv[cek[bhb][23]]=bhv[cek[bhe][23]][bhv[cek[bhc][23]]] bhv[cek[bhb][24]][bhv[cek[bhe][24]]]=bhv[cek[bhc][24]] if not cex then cew=bgl[cek[bhe][25]] cex=true end bhv[cek[bhb][25]]=cew bhv[cek[bhb][26]][bhv[cek[bhe][26]]]=bhv[cek[bhc][26]] bhi=bhi+1 bho[bhi]=bhv[cek[bhb][27]] local cfh=bho[bhi] local cfi=bho[bhi-1] local cfj=bho[bhi-bl[2][16][5]] local cfk=bho[bhi-bl[2][9][10]] bhi=bhi-bl[2][30][5] cfk(cfj,cfi,cfh) cen=cen+cep end bhv[cel]=cen bie=cek[bhe][1] end end else if bhg<=232 then if bhg>=232 then local cfl=bhf[bhe] local cfm=bhf[bhc] local cfn=bhf[bha] local cfo=bhv[cfl] local cfp=bhv[cfm] local cfq=bhv[cfn] cfo(cfp,cfq) else if bhg<=230 then bhv[bhf[bhb]]=bhj;else local cfr=bhf[bhb] local cfs=bho[bhi] local cft=bho[bhi-1] bhi=bhi-bl[2][16][5] local cfu=bhy(bhx,cft(cfs)) bhh=cfr+cfu-1 for cfv=1,cfu do bhv[cfr+cfv-1]=bhx[cfv] end end end else if bhg<=233 then local cfw=bhf[bhb] local cfx=bgl[bhf[bha]] local cfy=bhv[cfw] bhv[cfw]=cfy[cfx](cfy,bl[7](bhv,cfw+bl[2][16][5],bhh)) else do for cfz=bhl,1,-1 do local cga=bhs[cfz] local cgb=bhr[cga] if cgb then local cgc=cgb[1] if cgc==0 then if cgb[2]==bhv then cgb[1]=1 cgb[2]={cgb[2][cgb[3]]} cgb[3]=1 end else if cgc==bhv then cgb[1]={cgb[1][cgb[2]]} cgb[2]=1 end end end bhr[cga]=nil bhs[cfz]=nil end bhl=0 local cgd=bho[bhi] bhi=bhi-1 return cgd() end end end end end else if bhg>=222 then if bhg>=228 then if bhg<=228 then local cge=bhj local cgf=bhf[bhe] local cgg=bhv[cge] if not cgg then bie=cgf;end;else bhv[(bhf[bhb]-bhf[bha])]={};end else if bhg<=223 then if bhg>=223 then bl[20]=bhf[bha] local cgh=bl[30](bl[19]) local cgi=bl[30](bl[19]) local
